units.unit_name: Motion of System of Particles and Rigid Body
explicit_chapters: System of Particles and Rotational Motion

chapters.chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
chapters.source_chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
chapters.source_heading: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
key_concepts: Centre of mass (particles and rigid bodies)
Rotational motion equations vs linear motion
Acceleration due to gravity (variation with altitude/depth)
Gravitational potential energy and escape speed
Hooke's law, Young’s modulus, Bulk modulus, Shear modulus
Fluid pressure and Pascal's law applications
First and Second laws of thermodynamics
State variables and equation of state

units.unit_name: Behaviour of Perfect Gases and Kinetic Theory of Gases

key_concepts: Equation of state for perfect gas
Assumptions and concept of pressure in kinetic theory
Degrees of freedom, Law of equipartition
Electric field due to point charge
Electric dipole and torque in uniform electric field
Gauss's theorem applications (wire, plane sheet, spherical shell)
Capacitors in series/parallel and parallel plate capacitor with dielectric
Energy stored in a capacitor (formulae only)

subtopics: Drift velocity and mobility relation to current
key_concepts: Electrical resistivity, conductivity, and temperature dependence
Internal resistance of a cell and Kirchhoff's rules

units.unit_name: Unit-III Magnetic Effects of Current and Magnetism

key_concepts: Force on moving charge and current-carrying conductor
Torque on current loop and magnetic dipole moment
Qualitative treatment of magnetic properties in matter

units.unit_name: Unit-IV Electromagnetic Induction and Alternating Currents

key_concepts: Nature and properties of electromagnetic waves
